calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Aaron Dawson, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Synnex Technology, INC.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) The Ale Group, INC., a Virginia corporation;
Stephen Ale, an individual
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Dismissal of Does 1-10 on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $57,069.26
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9006.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $463.42
Total Judgment in the amount of $69,363.68
Judgment signed in open court.
